content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Ninja
description: Legendary Ninja is a Legendary Class Mod for Zer0 in Borderlands 2. It is a Maliwan-made Class Mod.
notes: Requires the Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge. It cannot drop or be used without that DLC.

special.description: At max level, grants +69% melee damage. The item is visually similar to the standard Ninja mod to help tell them apart.
special.title: "In the midst of combat, keep stillness inside of you."
